campaign: Notes inbox: full-text view + smart promote (short topic + full content)

phase_outcomes.P2: Full-text note detail dialog (issue #2). New controlled NoteDetailDialog co-located in notes-page.tsx (after PromoteToTaskDialog), opened from the NoteCard title which is now a bare text button (line-clamp-1 moved onto the button so the card preview STAYS clamped; body line-clamp-2 UNCHANGED). The detail shows the FULL untruncated title (DialogTitle, no clamp) + FULL UNCLAMPED body (whitespace-pre-wrap leading-relaxed — no markdown renderer exists in the web, pre-wrap is the house idiom) + metadata the card never showed (codeLocator path:line, author, created/updated/triaged timestamps) reusing AnchorRef for anchor + promoted-target + the badge trio. DialogContent adds max-h-[85vh] overflow-y-auto sm:max-w-2xl (long bodies scroll); sr-only DialogDescription satisfies the Radix a11y requirement. Rendered OUTSIDE the card's isOpen block so triaged notes stay inspectable. Triage actions (open notes only, isHuman-gated promote-to-task) are NOT re-implemented: the footer closes the detail THEN hands off to the card's existing Dismiss/PromoteToProposal/PromoteToTask dialog instances via lifted setters — only one Radix modal open at a time (no nested focus-trap), and P1's deriveNotePromotion prefill flows through unchanged. 4 new web tests (full unclamped body via raw textContent match since pre-wrap newlines defeat getByText normalization; codeLocator/severity/anchor metadata; triaged-note openability; action reuse → prefilled promote dialog). In-hand list note — NO fetch, NO server/shared/MCP/API change (body+codeLocator+author+timestamps already on the list note). web 490 (+4). typecheck/build (7/7)/lint (0 errors) green. Closes both reported notes-inbox issues (full-text readable + smart promote).
phase_outcomes.P1: Smart promote — short topic + full content as description. deriveNotePromotion({title,body})→{title,description}: title VERBATIM if single-line AND ≤120 (only-if-long guard, well-formed notes byte-identical); else shortened (first-line / first-sentence /^.*?[.!?](?=\s|$)/ / word-truncate-100 + '…'). description = [titleWasShortened ? title : null, body].filter(Boolean).join('\n\n') || undefined (full original title carried in when shortened — nothing lost). Server uses @pm/shared/utils/note-promotion.ts; WEB MIRRORS it to packages/web/src/lib/note-promotion.ts (the web package deliberately does NOT depend on @pm/shared — established mirror pattern like cacheConfigWarnings; the two copies must stay in lockstep). Web promote dialogs (PromoteToProposalDialog/PromoteToTaskDialog) prefill title+description from derived (user-editable). Server note.service.ts promoteToProposal/promoteToTask: finalTitle = title ?? derived.title; description base note.body??'' → derived.description??'' (provenance footer + codeLocator + trim/empty→null PRESERVED). MCP tool desc text updated (no logic). Byte-identity confirmed (well-formed: derived.title===note.title, derived.description===note.body). web test line-446 description: undefined → 'Some body text' (makeNote body default; planner's 'stays' claim was wrong). shared 526 (+7 helper), server 1733 (+long-title cases; the lone full-suite fail = the known responder-seal CPU-load timeout flake, passes 11/11 isolated), web 486, mcp 215. build/typecheck/lint green. No model/API change. d316436.

notes: User report: promote-to-proposal/task copies the whole note.title into the new title (cropped by line-clamp-1) + leaves description empty; AND no way to read a note's full text in the web (title clamp-1, body clamp-2, no detail view). Note model already has title+body. P1 = shared deriveNotePromotion helper (only-if-long guard ⇒ well-formed notes byte-identical) + web promote-dialog prefill + server default consistency. P2 = web full-text note detail view. Pure UX fix, no model/API change. Branch off main; do NOT push until user approves.
